title: Doja Cat Plays Surprise Set at Opening of Members-Only Club Zero Bond at Wynn Las Vegas
summary: Doja Cat surprised a star-studded crowd in Las Vegas over the weekend with a private performance to mark the opening of membership club Zero Bond inside the Wynn Resort. Doja Cat popped up from a makeshift stage overlooking the Wynn Golf Club just before 11 p.m. Saturday, performing a tight ten-min…
